memory:memory/2026-04-19.md:1:23.snippet: # 2026-04-19 Daily Log ## Democracy Pulse — Agent Created - **New OpenClaw agent:** `democracy-pulse` (id: democracy-pulse) - **Telegram bot:** @ClaudiusIndex_bot (account id: `index`) - **Workspace:** `/Users/claudius/clawd/democracy-pulse/` - **Model:** `ollama/glm-5.1:cloud` (same as main) - **Binding:** telegram accountId "index" → agent "democracy-pulse" - **Config applied** via `config.patch` — OpenClaw restarting ### Workspace files created: - `SOUL.md` — Academic research collaborator persona; challenges with evidence, transparency-first - `AGENTS.md` — Workflow: methodology development, data collection, scoring, reporting - `USER.md` — Alperen profile with democracy index context

memory:memory/2026-04-19.md:65:85.snippet: - Equal weights for pilot, calibrate later - Pilot set: 5 countries — Norway, USA, Turkey, India, China - GitHub Pages for dashboard (static, JSON snapshots) - Maximum automation aim, flag confidence levels - Theory before methodology — building definition first, then measurement - Monitory democracy is a normative model, NOT a measurement dimension - Existing index data categories are valid and useful — GST reframes, doesn't reject - Measurement dimensions structured by three pillars + six rights - Gap analysis is a core methodology across all dimensions ### Measurement Dimensions Structure **Pillar I — Integrated Will:** Press freedom, information environment health, Forced Substitution
